title: coffea canephora subvar. robusta
intro: Coffea canephora subvar. robusta, also known as Robusta coffee, is a subspecies of the Coffea canephora plant, which is a species of coffee native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural antioxidant and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The health benefits of consuming Robusta coffee include improved mental clarity and alertness due to its high caffeine content, as well as potential anti-inflammatory effects. Robusta coffee is often used to make instant coffee and espresso, and can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and beans in hot water.
